creator: ncopa@users.sourceforge.net
text:
On Wed, 2008-01-30 at 01:50 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of dns/dnrd,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/120136 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/120136
> 

Patch is approved.

While you are there, could you please change the maintainer address to
natanael.copa@gmail.com or do you want me to submit a new pr?

Thanks!

-nc
